# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Canonicalize and validate file paths to prevent path traversal.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Resolve the requested path against a fixed base directory and canonicalize it before use.
- Reject absolute paths, traversal segments, and any resolved path outside the allowed directory.
- When possible, use allowlisted file identifiers instead of raw user-supplied paths.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not join a user filename directly to a base directory and open it without validation.
- Do not rely only on checking whether ".." appears in the string.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Configuration
define('UPLOAD_BASE_DIR', __DIR__ . '/uploads');

// Ensure uploads directory exists
if (!is_dir(UPLOAD_BASE_DIR)) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Upload directory not configured');
}

// Get requested file
if (!isset($_GET['file']) || empty($_GET['file'])) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('No file specified');
}

$requestedFile = $_GET['file'];

// Security validation: Reject absolute paths
if (strpos($requestedFile, '/') === 0 || strpos($requestedFile, '\\') === 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Security validation: Reject paths with drive letters (Windows)
if (preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z]:/', $requestedFile)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Security validation: Reject null bytes
if (strpos($requestedFile, "\0") !== false) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Construct full path
$fullPath = UPLOAD_BASE_DIR . '/' . $requestedFile;

// Canonicalize paths using realpath
$canonicalBasePath = realpath(UPLOAD_BASE_DIR);
$canonicalRequestedPath = realpath($fullPath);

// Security validation: Ensure base path is valid
if ($canonicalBasePath === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Server configuration error');
}

// Security validation: Check if file exists and is readable
if ($canonicalRequestedPath === false) {
    http_response_code(404);
    die('File not found');
}

// Security validation: Ensure the canonical path is within the allowed directory
if (strpos($canonicalRequestedPath, $canonicalBasePath . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Security validation: Ensure it's a file, not a directory
if (!is_file($canonicalRequestedPath)) {
    http_response_code(404);
    die('File not found');
}

// Security validation: Ensure file is readable
if (!is_readable($canonicalRequestedPath)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied');
}

// Get file information
$fileSize = filesize($canonicalRequestedPath);
$fileName = basename($canonicalRequestedPath);

// Determine MIME type
$finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
$mimeType = finfo_file($finfo, $canonicalRequestedPath);
finfo_close($finfo);

// Fallback MIME type
if ($mimeType === false) {
    $mimeType = 'application/octet-stream';
}

// Clear any output buffers
if (ob_get_level()) {
    ob_end_clean();
}

// Set headers for file download
header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
header('Content-Length: ' . $fileSize);
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . addslashes($fileName) . '"');
header('Cache-Control: must-revalidate');
header('Pragma: public');
header('Expires: 0');

// Disable script execution time limit for large files
set_time_limit(0);

// Read and output file
$handle = fopen($canonicalRequestedPath, 'rb');
if ($handle === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Error reading file');
}

while (!feof($handle)) {
    echo fread($handle, 8192);
    flush();
}

fclose($handle);
exit;

?>
